title: 创建自定义资源池
code:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$rpcs = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService
$poolId = 'MyMemoryPool'

# 1) 取作为父池的根(primordial)池, 此处使用内存根池(ResourceType=4)
$parent = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object {
  $_.Primordial -eq $true -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 -and $_.ResourceSubType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
} | Select-Object -First 1

# 2) PoolSettings: Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData, 属性名为 PoolID(ID 大写)
$rpsd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData").CreateInstance()
$rpsd.PoolID = $poolId
$rpsd.ResourceType = [uint16]4
$rpsd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'

# 3) AllocationSettings: 对应资源类型的 RASD(内存=Msvm_MemorySettingData)
#    PoolID 必须等于【新建子池】的 PoolID(不是父池的空字符串);
#    各配额(Reservation/Limit/VirtualQuantity/Weight)均填 0 -> 子池从父池按需取用
$masd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_MemorySettingData").CreateInstance()
$masd.PoolID = $poolId
$masd.ResourceType = [uint16]4
$masd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
$masd.Reservation = [uint64]0
$masd.Limit = [uint64]0
$masd.VirtualQuantity = [uint64]0
$masd.Weight = [uint32]0

# 4) CreatePool 签名:
#    CreatePool(PoolSettings string, ParentPools REF[], AllocationSettings string[]) -> OUT Pool, Job
$r = $rpcs.CreatePool($rpsd.GetText(1), @($parent.__PATH), @($masd.GetText(1)))
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }

# 5) 读回校验
$child = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object { $_.PoolId -eq $poolId } | Select-Object -First 1
$child | Format-List PoolId, ResourceType, Primordial, InstanceID

# 6) 删除子池: DeletePool(Pool REF) -> OUT Job
$rd = $rpcs.DeletePool($child.__PATH)
if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
output:
Parent pool InstanceID=Microsoft:4764334E-E001-4176-82EE-5594EC9B530E
CreatePool ReturnValue=0
READBACK child pool: PoolId=WMITEST_resource_pool_create RType=4 Primordial=False InstanceID=Microsoft:CC91DCB5-1804-499A-8BAA-DFDB16150A7C
READBACK RPSD PoolID=WMITEST_resource_pool_create RSubType=Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory
DeletePool ReturnValue=0
CLEANUP ok: no pool with PoolId=WMITEST_resource_pool_create
RESULT: PASS
notes: 创建与删除资源池的方法为 Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService.CreatePool / DeletePool。
CreatePool 的三个输入参数为：PoolSettings（Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData 内嵌实例字符串）、ParentPools（REF 数组）、AllocationSettings（对应资源 RASD 内嵌实例的字符串数组）；输出为 Pool(REF) 与 Job。内存池场景通常同步完成并返回 0，无需轮询 Job。
设置实例时属性名为 PoolID（ID 大写）。读回时实例以只读属性 PoolId 暴露。WMI 属性名大小写不敏感，写入与过滤两种写法均可。

常见陷阱：AllocationSettings 中 RASD 的 PoolID 必须等于新建子池的 PoolID（而非父池的空字符串），且 Reservation/Limit/VirtualQuantity/Weight 必须全部为 0，以便子池从父池按需取用。若沿用父池空 PoolID 或设置了非零预留，CreatePool 提交的 Job 会失败并返回 ErrorCode=32773（Invalid Parameter，提示缺少资源类型）。
内置 New-VMResourcePool cmdlet 生成的子池 RPSD 与 MemorySettingData 中所有配额均为 0，且 PoolID 均指向子池名，可作为写法参照。
父池取根(primordial)池：Get-WmiObject Msvm_ResourcePool | ?{ $_.Primordial -eq $true -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 }。各资源类型（内存 4、处理器 3、以太网 10、VHD 31、GPU 分区 32770 等）均有对应根池可作父池。
DeletePool 要求子池无未结分配，否则返回 In Use（32774）。空子池可直接删除并返回 0。
Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService 自 build 9200 起提供，稳定可用。
notes_en: The methods for creating and deleting a resource pool are Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService.CreatePool / DeletePool.

The three input parameters of CreatePool are: PoolSettings (an embedded Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData instance string), ParentPools (a REF array), and AllocationSettings (an array of embedded RASD instance strings for the corresponding resource); the outputs are Pool (REF) and Job. For the memory pool scenario it typically completes synchronously and returns 0, with no need to poll the Job.

When setting the instance, the property name is PoolID (with ID in uppercase). On read-back the instance exposes the read-only property PoolId. WMI property names are case-insensitive, so either spelling works for both writing and filtering.

Common pitfall: in AllocationSettings, the RASD's PoolID must equal the PoolID of the new child pool (not the parent pool's empty string), and Reservation/Limit/VirtualQuantity/Weight must all be 0 so the child pool draws from the parent pool on demand. If the parent pool's empty PoolID is reused or a non-zero reservation is set, the Job submitted by CreatePool fails and returns ErrorCode=32773 (Invalid Parameter, indicating a missing resource type).

The child pool RPSD and MemorySettingData produced by the built-in New-VMResourcePool cmdlet have all quotas set to 0 and their PoolID pointing at the child pool name, which can serve as a reference pattern.

Take the parent pool as the primordial root pool: Get-WmiObject Msvm_ResourcePool | ?{ $_.Primordial -eq $true -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 }. Each resource type (memory 4, processor 3, Ethernet 10, VHD 31, GPU partition 32770, etc.) has a corresponding root pool that can serve as the parent.
DeletePool requires the child pool to have no outstanding allocations; otherwise it returns In Use (32774). An empty child pool can be deleted directly and returns 0.
Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService has been available since build 9200 and is stable.
code_en:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$rpcs = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService
$poolId = 'MyMemoryPool'

# 1) Get the root (primordial) pool to use as the parent; here the memory root pool (ResourceType=4) is used
$parent = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object {
  $_.Primordial -eq $true -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 -and $_.ResourceSubType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
} | Select-Object -First 1

# 2) PoolSettings: Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData, with the property named PoolID (ID uppercase)
$rpsd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData").CreateInstance()
$rpsd.PoolID = $poolId
$rpsd.ResourceType = [uint16]4
$rpsd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'

# 3) AllocationSettings: the RASD for the corresponding resource type (memory = Msvm_MemorySettingData)
#    PoolID must equal the PoolID of the [newly created child pool] (not the parent pool's empty string);
#    each quota (Reservation/Limit/VirtualQuantity/Weight) is set to 0 -> the child pool draws from the parent pool on demand
$masd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_MemorySettingData").CreateInstance()
$masd.PoolID = $poolId
$masd.ResourceType = [uint16]4
$masd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
$masd.Reservation = [uint64]0
$masd.Limit = [uint64]0
$masd.VirtualQuantity = [uint64]0
$masd.Weight = [uint32]0

# 4) CreatePool signature:
#    CreatePool(PoolSettings string, ParentPools REF[], AllocationSettings string[]) -> OUT Pool, Job
$r = $rpcs.CreatePool($rpsd.GetText(1), @($parent.__PATH), @($masd.GetText(1)))
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }

# 5) Read back and verify
$child = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object { $_.PoolId -eq $poolId } | Select-Object -First 1
$child | Format-List PoolId, ResourceType, Primordial, InstanceID

# 6) Delete the child pool: DeletePool(Pool REF) -> OUT Job
$rd = $rpcs.DeletePool($child.__PATH)
if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
